memory_bank_empty: Memory Bank empty. Save context using memory_bank_write when tasks are completed.
memory_bank_required: REQUIRED: Read ALL Memory Bank files (memory_bank_read) BEFORE any action. Restore full project context.
compacted_header: === COMPACTED CONTEXT === REQUIRED ACTIONS BEFORE CONTINUING:
compacted_step_1: 1. Read project CLAUDE.md to recover mandatory rules and skills
compacted_step_2: 2. Read ALL .md files in .memory-bank/ using memory_bank_read
compacted_step_3: 3. Restore full context: in-progress tasks, decisions, modified files
compacted_step_4: 4. Check applicable skills (brainstorming, debugging, TDD, writing-plans, verification)
compacted_step_5: 5. ONLY THEN continue working where you left off
compacted_reminder: REMINDER: Skills are MANDATORY even after compact. Check the skills table in CLAUDE.md.
pre_compact_step_1: 1. Save activeContext.md to Memory Bank with: current task, decisions made, modified files, next steps
pre_compact_step_2: 2. Update progress.md with what was done in this session
pre_compact_step_3: 3. Update techContext.md if there were technical discoveries
pre_compact_step_4: 4. Update systemPatterns.md if there were architectural decisions
pre_compact_instruction: Use memory_bank_write or memory_bank_update for each file.
pre_compact_warning: Compaction should ONLY proceed AFTER saving context.
stop_reminder: If task completed: update Memory Bank + tasks
dangerous_blocked: Dangerous command blocked. Use safer alternatives.
plugin_updated: Marketplace '{name}' updated. Run '/plugin update' to apply changes.
plugins_updated_summary: {count} marketplace(s) updated. Consider running '/plugin update' to apply.
